title: Putin remains uncompromising on Ukraine, but is public discourse on war changing in Russia?
summary_full: Russia is intensifying attacks in Ukraine but more than four years of war are causing concern even among Putin loyalists.
summary_public: Russia is intensifying attacks in Ukraine but more than four years of war are causing concern even among Putin loyalists.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Putin remains uncompromising on Ukraine, Russia is intensifying attacks
